description_long: This is a large, L-shaped sectional couch upholstered in a rich, chocolate brown fabric. The couch features thick, plush seat and back cushions, with the back cushions divided into three distinct sections for ergonomic support. The armrests are wide and padded, matching the overall soft and inviting appearance of the seating. The sectional includes a chaise lounge extension on one end, providing ample space for reclining or stretching out. The base of the couch is low to the ground, with short, block-style feet that are only slightly visible. The upholstery appears to be a solid color with a matte finish, and the overall design is modern and comfortable, suitable for both indoor and semi-outdoor urban environments.
description: A large, L-shaped sectional couch in chocolate brown fabric with plush cushions, wide padded armrests, and a chaise lounge extension. The design is modern, soft, and inviting, with a low-profile base and solid matte upholstery.
description_view_0: Front angled view showing the full L-shape, three divided back cushions, wide armrests, and the chaise lounge extension on the right.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the seat cushions, the height of the backrest, and the padded armrest on the left.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the continuous backrest and the solid, unadorned back panel of the couch.
description_view_3: Top-down angled view emphasizing the arrangement of seat and back cushions, the L-shaped configuration, and the chaise lounge extension.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: Three large, attached back cushions divided into sections, three seat cushions, and an integrated chaise lounge cushion; all cushions are attached and plush, with no visible accent or throw pillows.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: Solid chocolate brown fabric with a smooth, matte texture and subtle horizontal stitching on the back cushions; no visible decorative patterns or tufting.
attribute_leg_style: Short, block-style legs in a light color, mostly hidden beneath the base, providing minimal elevation and a stable, grounded appearance.
attribute_armrest_design: Wide, padded armrests at both ends, with a straight, rectangular profile and matching upholstery; armrests are at seat height and visually integrated with the couch body.
attribute_backrest_type: High, attached, and divided backrest with three distinct cushioned sections, each featuring horizontal channel stitching for added support and visual interest.
